How does gmurphy's kit work again?
How can she stack sacrifice to deal dmg?
E2
For each 1% of max HP you have in sacrifice stacks, you gain 3% critical damage
If you have 1,000 HP and 500 sacrifice stacks, you gain 150% critical damage

Got questions because it's getting harder for me to complete chapters. I was wondering which R wheels should I use? I just don't have any idea. Here's my box
You should swap out Greed for Gluttony as you can obtain 22% Maximum Health Bonus for dropping an Orison (up to 2 times)
Can help alot with Survivability
Would it be a good idea to raise all my awakeners to 60 for d zone
Because of the whole can’t use them twice thing
Yeah, you ideally want 5 Teams at Level 60 minimum for D-Zone as Characters along with Covenants & WoDs cannot be reused
Okay yes figured
Thank u snorlax
Yh np man and hf
Favor, Aged and Epiphany all work just fine but if you have better WoDs (SSR > SR) that you can use such as Aliemus Regen for Aigis or Sigil Yield for Caecus that would be ideal
got it
Oh lol
I’ll still take that advice
Yeah was a second part for him xD
Yeah, and if you're looking for BiS SR WoDs, Elevated Focus is the way to go for both Thais & GMurphy
So much terminology…
Alrrr I'll try. Bosses just deals too much damage
It's a short abbreviation for Best In Slot
oh that makes sense
seems obvious now that I think about it
You can consider giving Cloaked In The Night to Caecus then, it provides him with Sigil Yield & Counter Bonus
Yeah, it definitely helps understanding terminology for this game
I asked the same question before too
So you're definitely not alone in that

Greed is also by far the worst R Wheel too imo, the 30 bonus Black Sigils at the start is not worth dropping for attractive bonuses like Aliemus Regen / Keyflare or great stats like Death Resistance or Crit Rate / Damage
And you're also not likely to earn enough Black Sigils to actually purchase enough Relics to fill up the bonus Slots that it provides you with

Yeah, the only R Wheels that are really worth running are Frenzy = Emerge & Gluttony in that order as you gain access to Cursed Relics, can reset Shop up to 3 times at no Cost and are able to gain 22% Maximum Health (plus its multiplicative)
Alr thanks snorlax <:proud:1400771683664658433>
Btw, what's the best standard wheel to pull for? I haven't tried pulling and I got around 170 pulls now

With good filler options like Aged for Keyflare Generation on Battle Completion, Keyflare at the start of a Battle + 2 Keyflare at the start of a Boss Battle, Vitality to remove Symptoms (up to 3 times) for Black Sigils at Rest Areas
Generally it's Blade of the Titan > Incalculable Factor that are the most appealing

Blade of the Titan is a great all around option for DPS as you receive Crit Rate as a Primary Stat plus gain bonus Crit Damage after Casting Exalt on top of having a chance to reduce the Cost of the Wielder's Cards by 1

Incalculable Factor on the other hand is very valuable for Supports it has Aliemus Regen as its Primary Stat, raises the Aliemus generation of the Wielder and after they cast Exalt you will receive Keyflare
For their respective ideal Character Types, they are very attractive Wheels

I want to build the discard comp but D-Jewels are so scarce <:Pity:1400771620989308998>
You get 4 shards a month if you just do weekly missions

Aequor - You already have Myriam, Tulu & Murphy who you would have otherwise already obtained  

Caro - Salvador is completely serviceable at E0 as a Support but for DPS Flexible option wants E3 > OE, your Thais is already at E2 and Sorel + GHelot generally want E3 minimum for high Effectiveness

Chaos - Ryker & Hameln are serviceable at E0 but generally want E1 & E2 respectively to resolve some consistency issues with their kit, Tawil is not effective below E3 > OE > E7, 24 is generally ran as Supports for Aequor Teams but needs E3

Ultra - Horla is serviceable at E0 but generally wants E2 to resolve some consistency issues, Daffodil needs OE to raise her Damage Output, and Wanda had fallen off the Meta and faces the same issues as Doresain where outside of Arc 1 her Damage is not enough to take down Bosses

**Day 2 Mouchette Impressions** (Aggregated from current top EN players)

**Is Mouchette Powerful:** She is an ok, A~B tier dps. She can clear content. She is not top tier or overpowered. She won't break records unless you invest heavily into her and whale for her and her wheel

**Stopping Point for Pulls:** E3, but OE is good. I don't recommend using her before E3

**Best Teams:** Mouchette, Helot, Thais, Aigis/other supports. High investment accounts can also try mono chaos with Mouchette, Hameln, Ramona, Ryker/Alva

**Can I Use Her With Lotan/Gelot:** I don't recommend it as you will effectively have 2 dps on the team. A support that adds a damage multiplier to Mouchette, or adds defense or utility which Mouchette lacks, will be more effective than another dps

**Covenant:** Dreams of Medicine (recommended) or Burial Grounds' Sighs (if you have a good set). Prioritize Crit, Death Resist, Keyflare Regen

**Wheels:** Crit, Death Resist, Strike wheels work best. Best in slot are  her own wheel + Lily wheel. Lotan wheel, Blade of the Titan, etc. are fine

**Should I Pull Mouchette:** If you like her.

**Should I Pull Mouchette Wheel:** If you are prepared to invest heavily in her. There are other wheels that can substitute

**Day 2 Mouchette Impressions** (Aggregated from current top EN players)

**Is Mouchette Powerful:** She is an ok, A~B tier dps. She can clear content. She is not top tier or overpowered. She won't break records unless you invest heavily into her and whale for her and her wheel

**Stopping Point for Pulls:** E3, but OE is good. I don't recommend using her before E3

**Best Teams:** Mouchette, Helot, Thais, Aigis/other supports. High investment accounts can also try mono chaos with Mouchette, Hameln, Ramona, Ryker/Alva

**Can I Use Her With Lotan/Gelot:** I don't recommend it as you will effectively have 2 dps on the team. A support that adds a damage multiplier to Mouchette, or adds defense or utility which Mouchette lacks, will be more effective than another dps

**Covenant:** Dreams of Medicine (recommended) or Burial Grounds' Sighs (if you have a good set). Prioritize Crit, Death Resist, Keyflare Regen

**Wheels:** Crit, Death Resist, Strike wheels work best. Best in slot are her own wheel + Lily wheel. Lotan wheel, Blade of the Titan, etc. are fine

**Should I Pull Mouchette:** If you like her.

**Should I Pull Mouchette Wheel:** If you are prepared to invest heavily in her. There are other wheels that can substitute

When should you start farming covenants?

Kind of difficult to answer. Its reasonable to farm a set right after you unlock it if the covenant is good, but the way that you make your covenants better is typically by leveling them and rolling their substats. And that isn't something you can very effectively farm, it just comes with time and the reroll resources you get from the events and free battlepass.
Farm a set here meaning trying to get the correct main stats for the covenenat that you want.
once you unlock substats
if you dont have that unlocked yet, then just get the right covenants for your team for now

Current event gives you a free copy of the new character mouchette. Mouchette, thais, aigis (free character from early story), and helot/ramona should be more than enough to carry you through the early story.
